title: Workflow Activity Catalog Set v0.2
description: A named set of package activity catalogs as a JSON array. The first element carries set-level metadata; all subsequent elements are per-package activity-catalog v0.2 documents inlined in full. Distinguishing rule: element with 'metadata' key = set header; element with 'source' key = package catalog.

prefixItems.description: Set-level metadata. Always the first element. Identified by the presence of the 'metadata' key.

items.description: Per-package activity catalog, inlined in full.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this set was generated.
